final_prompt.prompt:
Create a technical instructional illustration showing how to deploy hermes inside a docker container and integrate glmcodingplan, with clearly labeled step-by-step panels.

Style/medium: needs a clean technical-diagram / infographic aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a vertical multi-panel layout with 4 clearly numbered steps (1 2 3 4) arranged top to bottom
Subject: must include all 4 deployment steps:
  Step 1: docker 环境准备 / 拉取镜像
  Step 2: 启动 hermes 容器 / 配置参数
  Step 3: 接入 glmcodingplan / 连接配置
  Step 4: 验证部署 / 运行测试
Scene/backdrop: must include a dark terminal / IDE-style background to reinforce the technical context
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: needs a dark-mode technical direction — exact accent colors and contrast ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include step labels "1" "2" "3" "4" (large, bold, each panel); must include section headings per step referencing "hermes", "docker", "glmcodingplan"
Constraints: must preserve the 4-step sequential structure; each step panel must be visually distinct and numbered; diagram must read top-to-bottom in order
Avoid: must avoid decorative or abstract art styles; must avoid any layout that obscures the step numbering
